knowledge.response: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
I'm doing well, thank you for asking! How about you?
I'm a Learning Agent, designed to improve through our conversations.
I'm an AI agent that learns from our interactions. The more we talk, the smarter I get!
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help with?
I can converse with you and learn from our interactions. I store what I learn and get better at responding over time!
I'm here to help! Just type your message and I'll do my best to respond. If I don't know something, you can teach me!
